purpose: Tracks unofficial pokesprite additions merged into pokemon-gen8 and pokemon.json so the sprites can be replaced later without rebuilding metadata from scratch.

not_in_pokemon_json.name: pombon
not_in_pokemon_json.reason: No canonical PokeAPI/species metadata yet; sprite merged only

not_in_pokemon_json.name: browt
not_in_pokemon_json.reason: No canonical PokeAPI/species metadata yet; sprite merged only

not_in_pokemon_json.name: gecqua
not_in_pokemon_json.reason: No canonical PokeAPI/species metadata yet; sprite merged only

replacement_notes: If a sprite is replaced later, keep the same relative file path whenever possible so pokemon.json does not need to change.
If a future replacement changes form naming, update both the sprite file path and the matching gen-8 form key in pokemon.json.
Oinkologne female follows the standard female folder layout: regular/female/oinkologne.png and shiny/female/oinkologne.png.

normalization.method: Trim visible pixels and composite onto a 68x56 transparent canvas using reference occupied-zone averages from pre-existing sprites.
